untranslatable_reason: Signal requires estimation of fundamental value and ownership cash flow analysis (dividends, earnings, asset liquidation value), which are not technical indicators available in the allowed indicator set. The core logic depends on external fundamental analysis rather than price/volume/technical data. Approximated entry as price at 80% of close (representing 20% discount proxy) and exit as price reaching close value, but this does not capture the true fundamental value thesis.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a value investing / fundamental analysis strategy that cannot be accurately translated into pure technical indicators. The entry condition '20% below fundamental value' requires external fundamental data (DCF models, earnings forecasts, asset valuations, dividend visibility) not available in the technical indicator set. The holding period of 24 months (720 days) and 35% profit target were captured in parameters. The max drawdown tolerance of 25% was set as stop_loss_pct. To properly implement this signal, a backtest engine would need to incorporate fundamental valuation inputs alongside technical data.
